assertions.reason: TS_O2CListenerProformaInvoiceBoundaryTest#proformaCreateAndUpdateRemainCommercialOnly confirmed sales-order create/update leaves journal, inventory movement, and invoice counts unchanged while status remains commercial-only.
TS_O2CListenerProformaInvoiceBoundaryTest#issueInvoiceForOrderFailsClosedWithoutDispatchCreatedInvoice proved InvoiceService rejects invoicing before dispatch and creates no invoice or journal truth.

evidence.detail: source-snippets.txt: InvoiceService.issueInvoiceForOrder returns existing dispatch-owned invoice only for a dispatched slip with invoiceId, otherwise throws dispatch-boundary errors (InvoiceService.java lines 65-100).

assertions.reason: TS_O2CDispatchProvenanceViewsAndEquivalenceTest#salesDispatchConfirm_createsNavigableProvenanceLinkedReferencesAndBalancedTruth verified the slip, order, invoice, AR journal, COGS journal, and dispatch movements all link to one another and resolve to persisted records.

evidence.detail: source-snippets.txt: SalesCoreEngine persists slip invoice/AR/COGS markers and InvoiceService linked-reference builder emits source order, dispatch, and accounting references.

assertions.reason: The same provenance characterization test asserted InvoiceDto.linkedReferences contains SOURCE_ORDER, DISPATCH, and ACCOUNTING_ENTRY entries with the expected document ids, numbers, and journal ids for a dispatch-created invoice.

evidence.detail: truthsuite-targeted.log: TS_O2CDispatchProvenanceViewsAndEquivalenceTest asserted linkedReferences size=3 and validated SOURCE_ORDER, DISPATCH, and ACCOUNTING_ENTRY payloads.
source-snippets.txt: InvoiceService.buildLinkedReferences adds SALES_ORDER, PACKAGING_SLIP, and JOURNAL_ENTRY references (InvoiceService.java lines 289-307).

assertions.reason: The dispatch provenance characterization exercised the canonical end-to-end flow and additionally proved balanced journals plus persisted linkage markers across stock, accounting, invoice, and order records.

evidence.detail: truthsuite-targeted.log: TS_O2CDispatchProvenanceViewsAndEquivalenceTest#salesDispatchConfirm_createsNavigableProvenanceLinkedReferencesAndBalancedTruth passed, including balanced-journal and linkage assertions.
source-snippets.txt: SalesDispatchReconciliationService delegates confirmDispatch directly to SalesCoreEngine.confirmDispatch, which handles replay-aware canonical linkage persistence.

assertions.reason: TS_O2CDispatchProvenanceViewsAndEquivalenceTest proved both endpoint orderings—factory then sales replay and sales then factory replay—converge on the same persisted invoice, journal, COGS, and movement truth without duplicate dispatch movements.

evidence.detail: truthsuite-targeted.log: targeted Maven run passed factoryThenSalesDispatchReplay_preservesEquivalentCanonicalTruth and salesThenFactoryDispatchReplay_preservesEquivalentCanonicalTruth.

source-snippets.txt: DispatchController and SalesController both route dispatch confirmation through salesDispatchReconciliationService.confirmDispatch, which delegates to SalesCoreEngine.confirmDispatch.

commands.observation: BUILD SUCCESS; 5 targeted truthsuite/integration assertions passed with 0 failures or errors.
BUILD SUCCESS; 2 narrow source-contract tests passed, confirming persisted O2C linkage markers and dispatch movement journal linkage expectations.
